* Gradle 5.0 or later - We use version 5.0, and tested with up to 5.5.1.

Seems only have to change:
work/ghidra-Ghidra_9.0.4_build/build.gradle

 9 if (gradle.gradleVersion != "5.0") {
     10         throw new GradleException("Requires Gradle 5.0, but was run with $gradle.gradleVersion")
     11 }
